---
title: 'Q&A Threads'
date: '2014-04-01T18:56:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Discerning The Time'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4536499656399020911'
blogger_filename: '/p/q-threads.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Discerning The Time/feed.atom'
---

I'm not an expert, but End Times Prophecy has been a hobby subject of mine for many years. Please leave any "legitimate" question you have and I'll answer it if I can. Or maybe one of the readers or other passerby's has the answer and they'll answer it for you. <br />
<br />
To Leave a new question start a new comment.<br />
<br />
To Reply to a quetion hit reply on that question to leave a sub/reply comment. <br />
<br />
Thank you for your participation. <br />
<br />
<br />
<br />Darrell
